name: vlm-tape-csg-geometry
description: VLM oracle: verify Box-Sphere CSG scene renders correct geometry

checkpoints.name: front-geometry
checkpoints.description: A 3D rendered scene against a dark background. The main object is a rectangular box with a spherical cavity cut out of it (boolean CSG difference). The box should have warm orange/amber material coloring. The spherical cutout should be clearly visible as a concave hemispherical depression on the front face, with sharp boolean edges where the sphere intersects the box faces. The object should be lit with visible shading across its faces.

checkpoints.name: three-quarter-depth
checkpoints.description: A 3D rendered box-minus-sphere CSG object viewed from a three-quarter angle (roughly 45 degrees from front, slightly elevated). The spherical cavity should be visible as a concave cutout. At least two faces of the box should be visible, showing distinct shading. The object should have warm orange/amber material. The background should be dark. No rendering artifacts, missing faces, or black holes should be present.
